title: jasione humilis subsp. sessiliflora
intro: Jasione humilis subsp. sessiliflora is a type of flowering plant, specifically a subspecies of the Jasione humilis, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Jasione humilis subsp. sessiliflora include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and congestion, and acting as an antispasmodic to soothe muscle spasms. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to be consumed, making it a popular natural remedy for respiratory issues.
